name: Klein-S2 Mining Laser
description:
Manufacturer: Shubin Interstellar
Item Type: Mining Laser 
Size: 2

Optimal Range: 60m
Maximum Range: 180m

Mining Laser Power: 720 - 3600
Extraction Laser Power: 2775

Module Slots: 1

Resistance: -45%
Optimal Charge Window Size: +20%
Inert Material Level: -40%

Laser Instability: +35%

Shubin designed the Klein-S2 to generate a powerful laser that makes mining faster. This power incurs additional risk by boosting a laser's instability, but if used correctly, the Klein-S2 can quickly reap rewards for the careful miner.
